creator: darrin.woods@classicsofttrim.com
text:
For the last 4-5 days cvsup10.FreeBSD.org has not been giving updates properly.  When trying to update ports, it shows that all ports are up to date and when trying to update src I get errors like:

Server warning: Cannot open "/usr/local/etc/cvsup/prefixes/FreeBSD.cvs/src/share/i18n/Makefile,v": Permission denied

How-To-Repeat: csup src or ports to cvsup10.FreeBSD.org
